MOTION For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
N O A P P E A R A N C E on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant RUBY'S DINER's motion to file an amended cross-complaint is granted except that the language "or made them recklessly without knowing whether the representations is true or false" is stricken from Page 14, Line 2 of Amended Complaint. (JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION For Order Granting Prior Separate Trial Of The Special Defense Of Release
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
N O A P P E A R A N C E on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff's motion for a separate trial of the special defense of release is deferred to trial judge. (JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION For Leave To File An Amended And Supplemental Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
H. Christopher Hittig, Esq. 362-9536 for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORPORATION moving for leave to file an amended and supplemental complaint
Scott A. Sommer, Esq. of MILLER, STARR & REGALIA 925/935-9400 for Defendant/Cross-Complainant RUBY'S DINER, INC.

There being no opposition to this motion, the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Grant -- non-opposition. 20 days to answer or otherwise plead. Order signed in open court. (JJM/md). Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION For Order Granting Prior Separate Trial Of The Special Defense Of Release
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Continued To Feb-28-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
H. Christopher Hittig, Esq. 362-9536 for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORPORATION moving for a seaprate trial of the special defense of release
Scott A. Sommer, Esq. of MILLER, STARR & REGALIA 925/935-9400 for Defendant/Cross-Complainant RUBY'S DINER, INC. opposing party

Argued and the Court continued this matter to FEBRUARY 28, 2002 -- to be heard with Plaintiff's motion to amend to bring in another party (agent).
(JJM/md) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
